---
name: New Agent
about: Propose or share a new agent for the community
title: "[AGENT] "
labels: ["agent"]
---

## Agent Name

What is the agent called? (lowercase with hyphens, e.g., `performance-profiler`)

## Domain

What domain does this agent cover? (e.g., security, testing, infrastructure, accessibility)

## Description

When should Claude delegate to this agent? List the trigger keywords and scenarios.

## Methodology

Briefly describe the phases or steps the agent follows.

## MCP Dependencies

Which MCP servers does this agent need? (e.g., context7, tavily, custom MCPs)

## Pull Request

Link to the PR if you have already created the agent file.
